reflection.candidate_lesson: A trade requiring a 56-day hold to realize its edge should be vetoed when 4 of 6 signal layers are ✗ — the macro thesis cannot survive that many days of contradicting price structure.
reflection.mechanism: The single closed loss shorted USDJPY on a rate_diff_z of -0.97 (weak macro) while HTF market structure was BULLISH, price was NOT at an OB/FVG zone, and there was NO CHOCH/BOS in trade direction. Institutionally, a 56-day cycle_divergence thesis needs price to eventually confirm; entering with structure actively against you means you pay carry/adverse-drift for weeks before the thesis has any chance to express — the stop gets hit first. The confluence count (✓ layers) is a proxy for how soon institutional flow aligns with the macro view.
reflection.testable_rule: if entry_context['hold_days_est'] > 30 and sum(1 for layer in signal_layers_active if layer.startswith('✓')) < 3: return ForexVeto  # long-horizon macro needs structural confirmation now

validation.reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
